title: Role and ResponsibilityR&R
description: Role and ResponsibilityR&R documents overview material for Role and Responsibility in the management domain. It is classified as a concept page for the memo class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 프로덕트 매니저, UX/UI 디자이너, 매니저, 테크 리드, and 엔지니어, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include role, responsibility, role and responsibilityr&r, role-and-responsibility, and management, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is management / role-and-responsibility / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
